y=o(z)local c=function()return A(r,{},z,y)end return c end,function(r,z)local y=o(z)local c=function(c,k,g,w,u,a,b)return A(r,{c,k,g;w,u,a;b},z,y)end return c end,{},function(r,z)local y=o(z)local c=function(c,k,g)return A(r,{c;k;g},z,y)end return c end return(h(103311+13930320,{}))(y(u))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[z(-634655+579429)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
